kumbakona kozhundhu

vetkathula

thudikkuthe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kumbakona Kozhundhu Vethalaiya?

The song is a romantic and joyful folk melody that celebrates love and cultural traditions.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The specific artists, including the singer and music director, are unknown.

When was this song released?

The song was released as part of an album on November 4, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kumbakona Kozhundhu Vethalaiya is a lively folk melody that exudes romance and happiness. It paints a picture of cultural festivities and the playful interactions between lovers. The lyrics reflect a sense of longing and excitement, making it an ideal choice for weddings and celebrations. Its upbeat tempo and traditional elements evoke a joyful atmosphere, perfect for bringing people together in merriment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Dive into the vibrant rhythms of Kumbakona Kozhundhu Vethalaiya, a delightful folk melody that captures the essence of Tamil culture. This song, part of an album released in 2017, brings a joyful and romantic vibe that resonates with listeners. Experience the charm and energy that makes this track a perfect choice for celebrations.
stanzaMeanings: You're looking at me like a special betel leaf from Kumbakonam. My ears are turning red with shyness.
You're asking me like a special betel nut from Pattukottai. My heart is beating fast.
When will you come to embrace me? I'll give myself to you completely then.
That first night, a special night, like a festival. When will it come? I'll wait with all doors open.
You're looking at me like a special betel leaf from Kumbakonam. My ears are turning red with shyness.
You're asking me like a special betel nut from Pattukottai. My heart is beating fast.
One day on the porch, uncle, I won't leave you alone, yes, yes.
One day on the bed, uncle, I won't let you escape, yes, yes.
This little girl is mine to hug, I have the right. I want to make her cheeks red.
That first night, a special night, like a festival. When will it come? I'll wait with all doors open.
You're looking at me like a special betel leaf from Kumbakonam. My ears are turning red with shyness.
You're asking me like a special betel nut from Pattukottai. My heart is beating fast.
Thinking about the past, uncle, don't forget. You must tell me old stories, yes, yes.
You must teach me remedies and lessons, uncle, as you promised, yes, yes.
This body is eager, the heart is waiting for you. The dark thoughts are gone, come for that.
That first night, a special night, like a festival. When will it come? I'll wait with all doors open.
You're looking at me like a special betel leaf from Kumbakonam. My ears are turning red with shyness.
You're asking me like a special betel nut from Pattukottai. My heart is beating fast.
When will you come to embrace me? I'll give myself to you completely then.
That first night, a special night, like a festival. When will it come? I'll wait with all doors open.
You're looking at me like a special betel leaf from Kumbakonam. My ears are turning red with shyness.
